Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.opendrain.OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis

Packages that use OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.opendrain
Open-drain review support using normalized STID/P&ID and optional tagreader evidence.

  • Uses of OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis in neqsim.process.safety.opendrain

    Sets fire-water density.

    Sets whether open-drain measures are installed.
    OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis

    Sets whether hazardous and non-hazardous drains are separated.

    Sets the maximum credible liquid leak rate.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static void
    OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.applySafeguardEvidence(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
    Applies document or design-basis safeguards that the numerical calculation cannot infer.
    private static OpenDrainReviewItem
    OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.createBaseItem(String areaId, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
    Creates a base review item from design-basis metadata.
    static OpenDrainReviewInput
    OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.createInputFromProcessSystem(ProcessSystem process, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
    Creates review input from every process-system unit that exposes an inlet or outlet stream.
    static OpenDrainReviewInput
    OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.createInputFromStream(String projectName, StreamInterface stream, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
    Creates a review input containing one item calculated from a NeqSim stream.
    static OpenDrainReviewItem
    OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.createItemFromEquipment(ProcessEquipmentInterface equipment, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
    Creates one review item from a NeqSim process equipment object.

    OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.createItemFromStream(StreamInterface stream, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
    Creates one review item from a NeqSim stream.
